subject: feat(burger-menu): add arrow key navigation, enforce z-index scale
body:
ArrowDown/ArrowUp with wrapping and Home/End key navigation added to
BurgerMenu.vue per glow-props BURGER_MENU pattern. Z-index scale
enforced: modals/drawers promoted from z-50 to z-[60] so they layer
above the burger menu (z-50). Affected: BottomSheet, ConfirmDialog,
HelpDrawer, InstallInstructionsModal, TransactionEditModal, TutorialModal.
CLAUDE.md z-index table updated. Theme UI already implemented. Build verified.

Tags: burger-menu, a11y, z-index, glow-props-sync

Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
